review_text: Quite pricey at $75 considering the pitches aren’t even close to level, the staff we interacted with were rude and we were packed in like sardines. The showers are luke warm at best. All in all this is a bad budget campsite so how on earth they can get away with charging $75 a night for a below average facilities is beyond me. Do yourself a favour and avoid this trap.

The Katoomba Falls Tourist Park is a credit to all involved.  We had an en-suite site which was immaculately clean. The laundry was also fantastic having both coin and card operated machines and dryers. The gardens are manicured, and we were only a few hundred metres away from both Scenic World and Katoomba Falls and the a majestic 20 minute walk to Blue Mountains info centre. We will be back!

Great location, but.....camping sites are small, and mix of dirt and some grass. They are also alongside public football oval so not really even inside the tourist park. Some BBQs at camp kitchen not working. Camp kitchen in old building with questionable cleanliness. Amenities are clean, but only had hot water 1 night out of 4 that we were there (you are given council phone number to raise this issue after hours - which is useless). There are only 3 mens toilets for the whole park. I would only recommend going here if you book a self contained cabin with its own bathroom/hot water/toilet, or an ensuite van site. This park is an example of a council trying to run a tourist park, rather then letting the professional operators do it.
This park was amzing, so friendly and so clean! Highly recommended. I would definitely stay here next time im back in the blue mountains
Good place overall, has many hot showers. Though if you are on unpowered sites, there is little space between each other
We had an excellent stay at this park in our camper trailer. It was clean, quiet, had nice hot showers and was close to some great spots! The communal areas were really good too!

Great location, very close to some great viel and short and long walks. Very nice people, we felt very welcomed from the very first second. One mini deduction: the sites are quite unebenen, levelling is essential
Great spot. Great camp kitchen and toilets.  They left heaters on in both all the time which must cost money for them but nice for us staying as it was cold. 5 stars for camping 🏕.
beds are rock solid, low-key crap. But the area and park is good :) staff were  kind and lovely.

My wife and I are here for a couple of nights after arriving today from regional Wellington and it's our first time here. Cabin is comfortable, very clean and also great value! The park itself is very nice, quiet and the young lady in the office is lovely!
Schön zentral gelegen zu vielen Aussichtspunkten und Wanderungen, Busverbindung zum Ort an sich. Die Anlage ist sauber und ruhig, sehr zu empfehlen. War gerne da.
Stayed using our van and the ensuite sites - fantastic - bus right outside the front gate, close to scenic world - would recommend
Great park clean amenities and walking distance to Scenic World.

Wonderful stay in an unpowered site and this beautifully maintained tourist park. Met with the nicest welcome! Grounds are beautiful and it a perfect location. Small drive to the main town. The amenities block is old but spotless. Would definitely stay again.
Allison is an absolute gem. Rocked up with no booking and she was so accommodating and welcoming. Great hospitality and location

Als je een groepje belgische meiden bent die de hele tijd duits spraken en 2 nederlanders afluisterde zoek ons aub op insta @lp.d77 - hoop dat de gesprekken leuk waren ;p

Wij hebben hier de afgelopen 3 nachten top verbleven. De kampeerplek zonder stroom is best ruim, meer dan genoeg ruimte voor onze auto met tent, en stoeltjes etc

De badkamers en toiletten waren verrassend schoon. In de vrouwen wc lag een hoop kleding de gehele tijd die niet weg gehaald werd, dus we vragen ons wel af of er echt dagelijks word schoongemaakt maar het lijkt er wel op

Alles was duidelijk, fijne sfeer, eigenlijk geen negatieve punten.

Als we ooit nog naar de Blue Mountains gaan zullen we deze zeker in ons hoofd houden!

시믹월드까지 걸어서 10분 걸림. 캠핑장 공용키친에는 웬만한 집기들은 다 비치하고 있음. 다만 쿡탑이 너무 작고 사용법도 생소해서 가이드를 잘 보고 써야함.
ensute 에 포함된 샤워실은 크고 깨끗함. 4개밖에 없으니 미리 예약필요.
아! 중요한 한가지 와이파이 없음.

Fabulous experience during a 5 days RV stay.  I found the staff helpful and hardworking - finding me an extra night at short notice - due to problems at another location.  Powered sites are mainly full slab large and well appointed . And very clean - and makes for quick set up.  Amenities clean and in good state - laundry cheap and available |But stand out reason to book is the location to walking trails and the blue mountains key highlites (some of them) |Literally steps from the park allowing lots of access - early morning and late - when the trails are part lit - a really super experience

Just brath taken moments up in Katoomba loved it. Most favourite place ever . No place like Katoomba. Blue mountains west of Sydney Australia New South Wales.
2780 .🤠💯🙉🙈🙊👍

Great location to use the hop on hop off buses the night walks to Katoomba Falls and look outs. Thats where the good ends and now the bad.  That fact that we mentioned to the mangers in the morning they where almost out of toilet paper, and it took me at 7pm to phone them very angry because there was none.  The water  leak mentioned in reviews 3 months earlier is still leaking.  The laundry 4 dryers 2 out of order the other to I could blow on the clothes to dry them quicker.   Its either the managers have no idea how to run the park or the council has tied there hands on maintenance.  Who ever is to blame needs to go. Will not be back

Katoomba Falls Tourist Park in NSW is an absolute gem for anyone exploring the Blue Mountains! Nestled just a short walk from Scenic World, the iconic Three Sisters lookout, and Katoomba Falls, its prime location makes it perfect for families, couples, or solo adventurers seeking convenience without sacrificing natural beauty. The park shines with spotlessly clean facilities, modern ensuite sites, cozy cabins, and friendly, helpful staff who go above and beyond plus a playground, bike paths, and camp kitchen for easy downtime. We loved the quiet, well-maintained vibe and value for money; it's a 5-star haven that feels like a home away from home amid stunning scenery.

We stayed at Katoomba Falls Tourist Park over the New Year holiday. Checkin was easy, site was easy to locate and was fairly wide enough to fit a 9p tent, a gazebo and a car. Amenities were great, the free to read pocketbooks in the laundry room were also a great addition. The park is also very near the Scenic World, just a short stroll we were able to go back to camp for lunch and rest and then reenter Scenic World in the afternoon. Overall a great park, and would hope to stay here again in the future.

Gepflegter Campingplatz, saubere Sanitäranlagen und Camp-Kitchen.
Freundliche Begrüßung und schöne Atmosphäre.
Die Lage Katoomba-Falls u.a. ist sehr gut.
Le personnel du camping est adorable et bienveillant. L’endroit est calme, bien entretenu et super bien situé pour le départ des randonnées !

Fantastic place and fantastic people. They went above and beyond to help us when we had mechanical problems with our indie camper van. Without Emily and T we would have got no assistance or decision made to resolve the problem, they truly were stars and got us on the road again after repeated phone calls. The site was clean and well managed with amenities close by. 🙂

We got a site right at the street and on top this site was also outside of the gate of the campsite. We did not feel safe leaving our stuff outside. I do not understand why they even rent out such a space and we even paid full price for this. Good thing is the location of the campground with a 5min walk to the lookout where you can see the "three sisters".

Paikka rauhallinen ja sijainti hyvä!

Vessat olivat epäsiistit, kauheasti torakoira lattialla.

Asiakaspalvelun puhelinnumeroon ei vastattu.
Don’t think twice, this campsite is one of the best I’ve stayed in. Super clean facilities, modern kitchen, heaps of space, perfect location! 10/10

Prima locatie. Wij waren met de camper en de plaatsen zijn een betonnen plaat. Echter het sanitair was in de avond vol met kakkerlakken en kleine vliegen. Voor deze prijs mag je verwachten dat het sanitair schoon is. Er was een code voor het sanitair-gebouw maar de deur stond constant open. Daar zou het management wat aan moeten doen.

Very expensive for what it is, intermittent hot shower and the weather was bad and cold. The unpowered site was so small we could barely put a table and 2 chairs.
The only good thing is being close to the katoomba falls.
Stayed in our caravan, well looked after with clean amenities, great staff and awesome location to explore from.

We stayed for two nights. It was amazing. Everything you need is reachable on foot or by bus. The camping kitchen is one of the best we've ever seen. The campsite is very clean everyone is polite and the location is great. It's small but good. There many birds visiting you.
Great location, clean facilities and really friendly reception team!

Caravan park powered site.
Amenities clean and modern.
Gardens need som maintenance and TLC
Staff are helpful when booking in.
For a nature park area surprise with no recyle bins available.

Geweldige lokatie en supervriendelijke medewerkers! Beginpunt van meerdere fantastische wandelingen. Tip: als je sportief bent kun je alles lekker lopen ipv via de tickets van senic world waarmee je via kabelbanen een deel van de routes aflegt (wel leuk voor kids).

Sehr ruhiger und gepflegter Camping.
Sehr nahe von den Three Sisters.
Wir haben die Zeit bei Ihnen genossen.

Generous sites and good facilities.
The location of the campsite is perfect!

Basic cabin with the necessities, clean & tidy, well priced & the camp grounds were neat & well maintained. Close to Scenic World & walks, not far from town for shopping or meals. Only an hour to Penrith & about 45 minutes to Lithgow.

This caravan park needs lots of maintenance.Cabins need new cutlery and china as well as extra utensils.The sliding door on bathroom did not slide and tile grout was mouldy.Only 2 out of 3 washing machines and 2 out of 4 dryers were working.Rubbish bins were overflowing.Come on Katoomba Council...Lift Your Game!!The only positives about this park are that it is quiet and it is very close to Scenic World,Echo Point and main street

I was a bit disappointed with this council run caravan park. Our site was all concrete there was nowhere to tie down the awning. We had some high wind gusts and couldn't safely leave the awning down. When rain forecast it meant we had to put are cooking equipment and chairs way each time, which was a pain.  We did see the day before we left big concrete blocks with hooks used to tie down awning but nobody told us about those and too be honest I'm not sure how effective they would be in really bad winds you could move them with 1 hand.
For a council park with no pool or other play facilities it seemed a little excessive. It needed maintenance, washing machine and dryers not working taps dripping. Signs said they were waiting for council to organise repairs. I hate to think how much water would have been wasted.
There was a good camp kitchen, 3 2 ring electric cooktops. Lots of pans and dishes, although some people left their dirty pans and grease all over the place.
Ablutions were okay basic but clean.  Had to use the end shower otherwise other peoples shower water would flow under the partition into my cubical.
The location was very good for the Katoomba falls, 3 sisters and Scenic World. Hard hilly walk into town 20 to 25 minutes.

Only one third of machines in the laundry work. And those that do aren’t perfect. Apparently because it is a council run park they can’t get approval.
Shame on you Katoomba council. You must make a squillion from this park. Make it convenient for those that stay there.

Lovely set up, really well taken care of. Feedback we raised was taken care of quickly (glass around site).
Woman on the front desk was really lovely 😊

Shuttle bus outside camp can take you into town or Uber is available.
Wir haben einen Late Check-In bekommen, da wir erst angereist sind, als die Rezeption bereits geschlossen war. Sanitäranlagen waren sauber und es war ruhig auf dem Platz

The staff are really friendly and attentive. They caught the outside cover of our tent when it was blown away and put it in for us. The recycling and rubbish sorting is to be improved. During our stay, the new management just took over, so all the waste went into the red bin within being sorted. Guest education needs to be improved, in terms of having clear labels of what can go into each bin. We jump into the bin and rescued 10 big bags of 10 cent bottles, 8 bags of recycled plastics, and 1 bags of soft plastics and a box of coffee cups. I think the bins should be designed in a way that guests can't push a large bag of "everything in one bag" in. A small input hole may make guests think twice and  less likely to chuck a big bag in.

I've been coming here since 1989 and find the place enchanting. It's a great place for walking with Scenic world and Echo point within a fairly easy distance. There is a night walk over the road, all lit up at night. The park is an easy driving distance to anything in the upper blue mountains. The cabins are excellent with everything you need, fridge, stove top, microwave (no oven though), bathroom etc. nice balcony. We had a Blaxland cabin, ideal for couples and up to four children. Totally recommended

Katoomba Falls Tourist Park was a pleasant surprise during our roadtrip. We only planned to stay a couple of days, but we ended up staying longer.
The shared spaces are clean and well maintained, with hot water always available and reliable Wi-Fi.
A perfect base for exploring Katoomba, Blue Mountains and surroundings🚐⛰️

Our family of 4 stayed just one night. The 2 bed cabin was very nice,  modern and very clean. One queen bed and 2 bunks. The staff were very friendly and accommodating.  Nice,  easy walking tracks right across the street with great views of the valley and 3 sisters. The cabins in some of the other parks we have stayed in over the past 2 weeks have been totally worn out for the same price.  So it's not cheap but it feels like you're getting a little value for money here...
Great location.. walk to Scenic World. Really chilled and welcoming staff. Very clean and tidy cabin. Very quite park. Will definitely stay there again.
Everything was good, only a bit expensive (for unpowered spot 67 p/night
Family friendly,  location ideal, neat and excellent amenities

We had an en-suite site. Park very well kept and quiet.  Our site was along the fence line adjacent to a busy road but the traffic noise didn’t affect us at all. Staff were very helpful. Our en-suite and other park facilities were very clean. We had a small problem with the lights not working but it was fixed as soon as we mentioned it. Immediately opposite Katoomba Falls and the beginning of the trail to The 3 Sisters and Echo point and  a short walk to Scenic World.  Will definitely stay again.

Booked specifically for scenic world, walking distance was perfect, staff were Amazing and helpful even gave us some coins for a load of laundry, we stayed in a cabin, it was clean and had everything you could need, quiet location and cute wild life even, highly recommend 🤩.

Wasn't impressed at all with this park. Arrived late, to our unpowered site, which wasn't at all level and right beside the football oval. Felt like we pulled up to watch a game of football not to camp the night. Camped right under trees where sticks fell out onto cars. Definitely would not recommend the unpowered sites at this camp spo, for $46 this is ridiculous.
Camp here, right in the mountains.  ⛰️  across the road are some great views and walks.
A long drive from home but we'll worth it a beautiful place

Prijs/kwaliteit erg duur maar positief was de ontvangst en de locatie : nabij Scenic world en Katoomba. Slechts 1 blok met toiletten en douches, waardoor je al snel ver moet stappen (als het regent van je dus kletsnat als je terug je camper in gaat), enkel als je alleen doucht heb je warm water, wifi enkel sterk genoeg aan de kampkeuken Weinig authenticiteit

Sehr saubere und große Sanitäranlagen
Über den Spiegeln sind Heizstrahler angebracht die über Bewegungsmelder angehen was im Winter sehr gut ist
Große Stellplätze
Katoomba street und Einkaufspassage ist in 15 min erreichbar
Start der Wanderungen zu Echo Point und three sisters ist direkt ums Eck

We had a great experience at Katoomba Falls Tourist Park. The prices are fair, the service is excellent, and the facilities are clean and well-maintained. The park is in a prime location, close to the falls and walking tracks, which made everything very convenient. My family and I had some really special moments here — highly recommend!
Great place to stay.
Park is ideal location to see valleys and scenic railways etc.

A concrete jungle in the blue mountains. All sites were completely concrete so no chance of tying down the awning in the wind. 3 out of 4 washing machines were out of order and 3 out of 4 dryers also out of order. So 1 washing machine and 1 dryer to service the whole park. Dump point hose looked 20 years old more cracks than you could count and leaking everywhere. Where are the maintenance staff? Didn’t see 1 maintenance worker in our 4 days there. All this for $75 a night!! Absolute joke wouldn’t recommend the park to anyone.

I don’t usually leave reviews, but our experience at this caravan park was disappointing enough that I felt I had to share.

Overall, the park is just okay. It’s very basic—concrete slabs with caravans packed side by side and no real sense of privacy or connection to nature. It felt quite impersonal. That said, the location is convenient for hiking in the Blue Mountains, which was the main reason we chose it. I guess you can’t have everything.

The real letdown came at the end of our stay. As a family with young kids, packing up always takes a bit longer. The kids were playing while we finished getting everything sorted, and we were literally about to jump in the car when a young staff member approached us and said, “Are you ok? You’re 40 minutes over time.” It was said in such an unpleasant and unnecessary tone. There were plenty of vacant sites around us, and it was obvious we were on our way out. A bit of understanding and basic courtesy would have gone a long way.

We love the Blue Mountains and will definitely be back—but not to this caravan park.

Wow wow wow : loved this park
Cabin super clean 10/10, over looking oval
We walked in and the heater was on, 2
Degrees outside, lots of room, park is immaculate, well done, hoping to stay longer than 3 days, friendly staff.
Great location 😁😁😁super happy
Great location and camping

The very best location in an excellent setting.  A short walk to the Cliff Top Track and Amazing views. The 686 bus stops outside and takes Opal cards!!! Facilities are great.  Thanks Folks. We loved it here

Ditto again in 2025.  Unfortunately we’re not warned the Laundry was closed with every washing machine and dryer out of action.  Very disappointing.

Sehr gepflegter Campingplatz. Canon und Scenic World in Laufweite.
Die Sanitäranlagen sind sehr sauber und das Personal sehr freundlich. Wir haben einen Late Check-in gehabt. Es lief alles reibungslos.
Wir kommen gerne wieder.
Stayed in my campervan. Very clean, tidy, secure & organised camp plus very close to the "Three Sisters" lookout
What we were expecting. Nice stay. Please do something about the stains on the lounge. Looks like a free roadside find.
Spectacular place, beautiful rooms, helpful workers, so close to town and many attractions, wish we had more days to relax here, can't wait to get back here sometime soon 6/5 stars

This place was a rip-off! It was dirty with an outdated appearance.
The beds seemed to be made for dwarves - way too small even for me (and I’m only 5’5”!)
The stove looked way too dangerous to cook on.
There were cicada shells al over exterior of the cabin.
The whole place appeared creepy and rundown.
We cancelled as soon as we saw it. The lady at reception didn’t smile, but gave us an (almost) full refund. Hence the two stars!

An excellent caravan park close to many attractions. Close to town with a very hill walk or short drive. Note there are parking meters everywhere though town and at attractions
Amenities were clean and spacious and sites generous. We enjoyed staying here
stayed here for one night camping. the staff were so friendly and helpful and the facilities were brilliant. 10/10 would stay again

Clean park, great friendly staff. ||Had originally booked for 2 nights but were looking for a third. We let the staff know and although there was nothing available to our surprise they called us later in the stay to let us know someone had cancelled and they were able to move a few people around to give us an extra night without moving the van. ||Great location with easy access to all the great sights.
A nice van park. Small and cozy. There are 4 caravan ensuites.

Great location in town.
But the moshpit unpowered site beside the oval  was not worth $42 a night the only thing to save you from a 2 ☆ was the showers were wonderfully hot and the heater in the bathrooms .
- Hi Ashley I as a customer of your park I should not have to tell your staff you placed me on a moshpit. If you do your daily rounds you would have not put anyone on this site if you had good management . You also think this acceptable for your customers 🤔 . I've been to free camps, national park and pub camps that were 100 times better.

주방 너무 잘 돼있고,
화장실-샤워실 너무 깨끗하다!!
위치도 좋음!!
블루마운틴 가려면 무조건 강추!
여긴 인기장소라 최소 3일전엔 예약하는 걸 추천
It's serviced well. I will go there again.

Had a great time. Facilities were good and cleaned often. Had to wear an eye mask in my tent as there are a lot of lights that are on all night. Showers were sometimes hot but sometimes not. I suspect the hot water tank is small (or small for peak Easter season). If you waited a few minutes and no one else was showering then the water would warm up. Need to bring cashola if you want to wash / dry laundry. The machines don't take card. Seems to be run by a very helpful young English couple. Great proximity to Bluies climbing.

You will get woken up by birds at 6.30/7 in April, but there are worse ways to be woken up.

Our site was close to a busy rd (most sites are not). Lots of road noise up until about 10pm at night. It wasn't a problem after that.

Arrived on Sunday in the poring rain, the young staff member at the desk was very joyful and helpful and made the check in fun and welcoming. A special tank you.
The first 2 nights we had heaters in the bathroom and that helped when needing the bathroom in the wet and cold, on Tuesday they were turned off. As this is a council owned Caravan park we noticed as many times before that instead of putting the money back into maintenance to assist with the upkeep it seems to be used elsewhere.
4 machines have been out of order in the laundry, 1 male shower out of order, soap holders in male and female shower needs putting back onto the wall, since Tuesday the second hand dryer in female bathroom not working. Early morning when using male toilet no light outside difficult to use keypad when issues with sight.
The bathrooms were kept clean, lovely set up so that water doesn't run out of shower, and mop to use after shower. Unfortunately we had issues with having a hot shower, didn't require any cold water and still was only luke to warm and suddenly would go cold even when only one in shower.
Lovely dining room and kitchen, close to hop on hop off bus. If it was not for the maintenance issues I would have happily given 5 stars. Would come and stay again.
שהינו במקום יומיים. ישנו בקמפרוואן. מיקום מעולה,  נקי מאוד, נוח, מצויד ונעים. ממליצה בחום

We stayed there over long weekend total of 5 nights in RTT. Unpowered sites are maybe not the best and very close to each other. Powered sites are nice, like in any other good caravan park.

5 star location, you can walk to Scenic World (10min), heaps of walking trails on the other side of the road and cool lookouts close by. Amenities were very clean and cleaned daily. Toilets and kitchens have heaters which were much appropriated on a rainy days.

We got lucky and had good neighbours so it was very quiet sleep for us on a very busy weekend. Price wise it’s fair price for prime location, i don’t know any other caravan parks which has such a good location.

Wifi didn’t work, but it’s the same in every caravan park in Oz.

Location perfect. Sites are sloped but allowed easy water run off. Staff were great and very helpful. Magnificent walks and hikes close by. The bathroom was clean and heated. Wonderful touch. Only complaint is the shower heads wetting entire area making it hard to get dressed. Different heads would fix it. Thanks for a lovely stay.

Fantastic location and the front desk staff are great. However, the site itself isn't the best we've been to. The powered sites are directly outside the kitchen block, where the really bright lights don't turn off until after 11. The sites are so close to each other we could hear the guy two sites away snoring.  2/3 of the washers were out of order, 1/2 of the dryers out of order. Nobody out checking that people adhered to quiet hours. But, the shower temp and pressure was nice! Wouldn't go back, wouldn't recommend if you're after laundry or sleep.

Busy camping ground over the Easter long weekend and a great location next to the surrounding visiting site. Good amenities and camp kitchen. Could do with a second fridge for busy period.  Cannot say I saw anyone emptying the bins during our stay. ( plenty of signs to remind you to clean afteryourself though)With the unpowered camp site, they are the smallest I have ever seen with uneven surface. You feel quite cramped in there. May be provide less site with a better size for them all... the only interaction with staff was with a working holiday person who was very friendly.

Location is very good. Very close to the Three Sister which is very nice. Bathrooms are okay as well. That’s about the only nice thing about this camping though. Unpowered spots are very (very) small. Furthermore you don’t have to expect anything from the service from the staff. Barbecues weren’t working either and that isn’t acceptable when you charge $55 for an unpowered site. Wifi is also not working 90% of the time. Wouldn’t recommend this camping at all.
Great caravan park. Easy walk of bus to town. Right on the start to some of the scenic walks in the area.
Excellent location to camp with great facilities and direct access to some fantastic walks

We had one of the en-suite campervan sites. It was excellent, super clean and just what we needed. We saw lots of great wildlife in the morning- especially birds. The staff were helpful and friendly. We would stay again.
The park and amenities are lovely, but it is very frustrating to never have even a warm shower much less a hot shower no matter what time of day I try.
Leuke kampeerplek precies voor een ingang van een wandeltrail. Camping is voorzien van alle gemakken. Wel vantevoren reserveren als je een plek met stroom wilt hebben

Tent spaces are smaller than small, one  Meter next to the neighbour, pourly flat area. Luckily people were quiet.
Restroom floors quite dirty. Nearly half of laundry facilities were out of order.
Far too expensive for what you get comparing to other campgrounds.
Clean, tidy and quiet.  The en-suite facilities were exceptionally good. Plenty of bird life ( cockatoo, magpie and galas) . We would have no hesitation in recommending to others.
Expensive 🫰🫰 for 1 night

Great little park. Clean amenities, good camp kitchen and well maintained park. Close walk to Katoomba Falls/Cascades and 5 mins from Scenic world. Big Red Bus stops out the front and for $55, 3 day pass will take you to all the great spots. Would definately stay again
Personnels très accueillants. Emplacements alimentés spacieux et bien entretenus. Toutes les commodités sur place. Idéal

Uneven tent sites which can get very muddy if raining. The spots were also quite small and very noisy with vehicles and a stadium right next to it.  Upon arrival, we found the staff not very welcoming.

Good value for the price though, as the showers were clean and the shared kitchen well equipped.
Sehr gepflegter Campingplatz in perfekter Lage zu den Wanderwegen. Sehr empfehlenswert!
A very well located campground if you want to explore Katoomba Falls and Scenic World walking. Is very busy in summer so please book in advance a site if you need cabins or powered sites

You are pretty much on the blue mountains track
This is a amazing caravan park, clean, full of kookies and very close to the tracks
Super recommend

Great kitchen area

Sehr freundliche und hilfsbereite Mitarbeiter. Die Parzellen sind gross. Der ganze Platz ist sehr sauber und die WC/Duschanlagen sind sehr gut und ebenfalls sehr sauber. ||Die Blue Mountains und deren Hauptsehenswürdigkeit (Three Sisters) sind zu Fuss zu erreichen.
Beautiful. Well worth the effort hiking. All is maintained.

Very disappointed with the service by the caretakers here. Great park and facilities otherwise.

Not the experience I had had the last time I was here. Booked 4 months in advance for 2 vehicles on 1 site or 2 vehicles and 2 sites and made it very clear we needed access to both vehicles at camp while we were staying there and the day we arrive, we were told only 1 vehicle can be parked on the site and the other had to be parked outside of the caravan park in public land. Later that night we had been out to get pizza and got back to camp in the vehicle that we couldn’t leave on our site to unpack a couple extra items and not long after we got back to camp the caretaker told us “you can leave in the morning”. This happened on our day of arriving and after I paid the remainder of the fees.

Others who were camping here at the same time had bad experiences with these caretakers too commenting “this guy has lost it”.

Never expected such disgusting behaviour from these caretakers, which certainly put a dampener on our holiday.

The issue could have been resolved in a much better manner by owning up to their mistakes of stuffing up our booking rather than acting like a power hungry jerk.
Très belles chutes d'eau avec de jolies balades parking payant
Good place, the amenities are clean. The staff is lovely.

The location is perfect- straight across the road to Katoomba Falls, all the walking tracks,Echo Point, the Three Sisters and walking distance to Scenic World.  Beautiful surrounds, so green.  We stayed in a  Blaxland cabin.  Very comfortable bed and pillows, everything in the cabin we needed, shower was great, and a balcony out the front with daily bird visitors (despite not feeding them). Would highly recommend - we loved our visit, and would return.

Ein netter Campingplatz, sauber gehaltene Waschküche und Kochgelegenheiten. Wir hatten eine Ensuite mit unserem Motorhome, alles sehr sauber und genügend gross. Die Lage ist ideal für Ausflüge in der Gegend oder auch einem Ausflug in die nage gelegenen Wälder.

Stopped at Katoomba falls Tourist Park in November in our caravan. This Park is in a wonderful location close to all the attractions Katoomba has to offer. Great wild life everywhere and there's some lovely walking so bring your walking shoes. We really enjoyed our four nights and will definitely be back when we come by this way again.

Great campground right Blue Mountains National Park. Good amenities. Well serviced by buses. Friendly staff. The Kookaburras were stunning.
Would easily use this ground again

The park is truly a fantastic destination, and we had a wonderful time enjoying the beautiful surroundings and well-maintained facilities. One minor area for improvement, however, was the tent site where we stayed, it was a bit uneven and had sparse grass coverage, which made it less ideal for pitching a tent. Given that bookings are often made over the phone, it might be helpful if these details were shared during the reservation process to help guests prepare accordingly. A simple solution could be to even out the ground and consider replanting grass patches or providing some artificial grass for powered sites used by tent campers.||All in all, we had a lovely experience, and we greatly appreciate the care taken in keeping the park in such great condition.

A relatively  small caravan camping park.
Right across from Katoomba Falls scenic area and kiosk, this small park has security gates, reasonable amenities, great kitchen. All van sites have 5° slope. Tent sites seemed cramped and off away. Well lawned, good shade.
We did not check the cabins.

Stayed here in a tent on an unpowered site. Liked the location across the road from the scenery and hikes. The amenities block was clean and there was an excellent camp kitchen. The sites however are tiny and cramped and you are packed in like sardines. No privacy for tent campers at all!

Nothing not to like about the park. Friendly helpful staff, grounds and amenities meticulously maintained. Great sites, close to town, walking distance to Scenic Railway, quiet and peaceful surroundings.
Great camp! Clean, with internet, bbq, great kitchen. 42 bucks without power
Pretty good, clean facilities and friendly staff.
Lovely clean facilities! Nice and peaceful ..except for the local cockatoo flock lol. Only downer was we couldn't light fire boxes
Best caravan in nsw!!
Great location. Amenities were clean. Nothing bad about the place but it didn't wow me either. No pool, jumping pillow etc... if you have kids. Stayed on a powered site.
Very clean, hot showers, amazing location

This is a lovely, clean, quiet park really close to Scenic World and walking distance from the main lookouts in Katoomba.  There is a bus stop outside the gates for the Hop On Hop Off bus so it's location is perfect.  The hosts were lovely, informative and helpful.
Great location,  walking distance to Scenic World and Cliff walk. Clean and tidy amenities and well priced
It is close to the town and overall a good new experience.
Schöner Campingplatz, alles sauber und gute Küche um zu kochen.

Overall very good camping. Community services are provided with electrical heaters, providing a warm place during the cold evenings. Sanitary services are clean. The only disadvantage is that there are not enough pitches to cook on. Besides this, the provided pitches do not work appropriately. This is an improvement to be made in the future.

It's a really good place to stop on the mountains so close to scenic world and the lookouts etc.
Easy access for most sites. The ensuites are worth the extra $5.   Very clean and tidy park. A couple of the sites are a little tight to get into, but there are plenty to choose from and well spaced out. Will definitely be back.

Great little park in an even better location. Right across from the iconic blue mountains and a 5 minute drive from the town center.
We called up and booked on the way to Blue mountains whilst on a road trip and the customer service was great.
Hands down best camp shower I’ve ever had was at this caravan park!

We just spent 11 nights in the caravan.  Amazing spot, right across the road from the Katoomba Falls, Scenic world etc.
Plenty of flowers blooming and birds chirping. Toilets and showers were clean. Staff were all excellent. We had a great time and if we are back this way, theres only one place i want to stay!!

Stayed during the winter on an unpowered site for a few days. Great kitchen facilities including plugs which are helpful to charge phones when on an unpowered site and a heater in the bathrooms which is perfect for when you get out the shower. Very close to some walks so you can leave the car there and head out for the day

We have just left the van park now and there’s not enough room here to write all the nice things I want to! We had a bit of a disaster weekend with our van, absolutely everything went wrong. Right as leaving we found our biggest problem and it was a big panic — the caretakers at the park were incredible — gave us extra time to deal with it, offered advice and even shared their own resources with us. What a lovely pair! We had an en-suite site and it was modern, lovely and clean. The van site was great, plenty of room, nice and level. When we sort out our van, we’ll be back!

We stayed in the Blaxland Cabin for 4 nights. The cabin was great. Clean and comfortable. Great location. They also have powered and unpowered sites available. Maybe a 100m out the front of the park, and you're at a lookout. Definitely recommend staying here.
Great place, very quiet and amenities are super clean. Hot water and heaters on the bathroom. Great location as well.
Always good to come back here.

Wonderful friendly staff. We chose to stay in the budget style cabin which was extremely comfortable, warm and had it's own bathroom and kitchenette. Grounds were neat and tidy and even though we didn't need the bbq area or facilities, from what we saw they looked amazing.

Great place to stay .really nice staff
one of the best stays .
walking distance to all most all the attractions

We stayed at a powered ensuite site and loved it. The ensuite was a luxury with the heat lamp and towel rails. We had a terrible weekend with weather but the park looked beautiful in the fog. Across the road is the lit walkway which was lovely to walk along at night. We are looking forward to returning.

Sloped pads for caravans absolute pain to get set up. Called to check price before arriving and was told the off peak price, arrived and found my partner who went in to pay was charged $14 more. I went in to inquire why and the lady stated she never told me the off peak price over the phone. Sure honest mistake she said the off peak price instead of the peak price but own up and say sorry or even be polite and honour that price don’t just deny you ever said it. Super rude would never visit again. Also ridiculous at $65 for a slab on a hill.

Re your response:
Way to stick to it bud. Go you. You were on loud speaker haha. Also the other park was visited in person for pricing and we unfortunately left there to drive to your park after calling as you gave us a false price over the phone. Had you stated the correct pricing we would have just stayed in the far nicer park at the previous town.

Enjoyed our time here. Stayed in an ensuite site. Was a little hairy with the wind and tree branches falling. Staff were fantastic and the park is very clean. This park is in the perfect spot for sightseeing.

Service was ok can be improved. Location was ok. Toilets were clean and looked relatively new. Hot shower consistently had a short burst of cold water in between.

Concrete slab was not level, so the water on our kitchen sink consistently flowed out.
The location is ideal, we love it!

Location is great, very close to walking tracks. Park is a bit of a concrete jungle with little privacy but everything was very clean and the staff was very helpful. Close by is a lit up night walk with waterfall views that ends at 10pm. Bathrooms have heat which was fantastic.
Beautiful caravan park very central, friendly staff nothing is a problem. Very clean amenities & heated. Very highly recommend.

Good facilities, perfectly placed for Scenic World. Across the road from the entrance is a short board walk which is lit in the evening.

Also, if you do the tourist bus tour, the bus stops both sides of the road so if you miss it, you don't have to wait an hour for it to come round again.

Word of warning.  If you decide to walk into town, it is up hill most of the way.
Super, sehr ruhiger Ort, und gepflegt. Wir waren mit unserem Wohnmobil ein paar Tage vor Ort. Er liegt direkt gegenüber eines Aussichtspunkts.

All round place to stay. Close to sight seeing walks which are excellent. Close to public transport and hop on hop off buses and scenic World
Not 5-star luxury but 5-star location.

Camp site was very clean with soft grass. Facilities were clean and cleaned regularly. Park is in walking distance to hikes and Scenic Word. The camp kitchen had everything you need and a great place to escape from the rain with chairs, tables and couches. We had a great time and would definitely stay again.

Very Quiet place to stay.  Friendly staff, accommodating.

Central to lots of tourist attractions
Location is great but most expensive camp ground we have ever pitched our tent in. And the campers are put down the back away from amenities

Such a convenient location! During busy periods the unpowered spots can feel a little crowded and camp kitchen is only quite small for the amount of people it services, but amenities are otherwise good. Youll also sometimes get heavy mist/fog from the nearby falls

Grrat spot to stay. We were caravanning but plenty of cabins. Access to hiking trails at your doorstep. Amenities block clean & tidy but some ensuite options available with powered sites. 10mins walk to Scenic World. A great place to stay when visiting the Blue Mtns.

Great camp, nice flat concrete powered sites and the staff are very nice. The location is superb with magnificent views only 100mtrs from the camp. Scenic world is also only a short walk away. Only downside as mentioned in numerous reviews is the toilet blocks which require an upgrade all round but dont let that put you off as the location is amazing.

Zeer nette camping met veel bomen en groen. De locatie van de camping is goed op loopafstand van diverse activiteiten.
Verbeterpunt: de douches hebben geen verstelbare douchekop en zijn te klein voor lange mensen. Daarnaast is het zeeprek erg onlogisch geplaatst waardoor je met je rug er tegen aan komt.
De keuken is goed ingericht, echter hebben de kookpitten weinig kracht. Het duurt erg lang voordat iets kookt.

Great place to stay great service & camp kitchen  well maintained close to scenic world & the other attractions of Katoomba only bad thing I can say is the male toilet amenities are a bit small so you may have to wait

Small park. Well located right at the trail head. Sites are fairly level. Amenities block is modern and clean. Was booked out over Easter weekend so pretty busy.
Camp kitchen is dreary but I never use them anyway. Camper sites 1 and 2 are right next to a bus stop and playground so if you're looking for peace and quite I'd suggest asking for something up the back, however since you don't have to go through the boom gate they're the easiest to access!

Bestens gelegener Campingplatz mit allen Annehmlichkeiten, die man so braucht. Saubere, moderne Amenities, eine schöne Camp Kitchen und ein guter Ausgangspunkt für Wanderungen in den Blue Mountains, insbesondere zu den Three Sisters.
Prachtige camping  Prachtige locatie, nette voorzieningen en vriendelijk personeel.
Super Campingplatz mit Fußläufigkeit zur Scenic World und den Three Sisters

Lage ist einfach perfekt, direkt bei allen Sehenswürdigkeiten. Wir mussten unser Motorhome nie bewegen, da alles zu Fuss oder mit dem Bus erreichbar ist. Zu Fuss 5min zu den jesten Lockouts und beleuchteter Nachtweg. Sehr saubere Camping-Anlage, vor allem auch die sanitären Anlagen. Und der erste Camping in 1 Monat, auf dem das Licht in den sanitären Anlagen nicht die ganze Nacht durchgehend brennt, sondern über einen Bewegungsmelder verfügt. Von hier kommt man mit dem öffentlichen Bus easy in die Stadt Katoomba.

Wir sind in unserer 3-Wöchigen Australienreise gleich zwei mal hier gewesen (Campervan). Der Empfang war immer freundlich und der Campingplatz bietet ein tolles Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis. Die Sanitären Einrichtungen waren immer sauber und wir haben die Camp-Küche gerne genutzt.

Excellent location as the Falls and cliff walk are right across the street.  This holiday park is a great value for the price.  It's definitely no frills. Our cabin had what we needed but nothing extra...no extra towels, no washcloths, no shampoo/conditioner, body soap or Lotion which have been included at other holiday parks. We did have coffee making supplies and a full kitchen as well as wifi at the camp kitchen.
Great location and the managers were very friendly and helpful. The powered sites were great and the facilities were clean. A great spot to set up and explore the area.
Staying with a big group and none of the bbq work. Had a line up of people trying to use one hot plate inside the common area. Owners don’t seem to worried about the situation

Passing through with our campervan we stumbled across this lovely little place!

Not disappointed at all and the amenities are amazingly clean and well maintained!
Great location, and found the staff were very helpful with any queries

This is an incredible location you are five minutes walk from Katoomba Falls, a minute walk to the scenic world ropeway and likewise a 10 minute walk to the echo point viewpoint,  you can have a lovely view of the Jameson Valley.||Now about the accommodation this is an incredible Caravan park camping ground cum hotel with lovely cabins - safe secure great bathrooms great camp kitchen with a TV lounge||highly recommended - the best part about this resort is its stunning location as it’s set in a meadow surrounded by dense forest with a Creek which flows by the periphery of  the camp  grounds.
We stayed in the older cabins and found it comfortable. It looks like the park is updating its cabins. The park hosts the right amount of people which means you can get enough privacy.

Sehr ruhiger, gemütlicher Camping.
5‘ zu Fuss und man ist beim Katoomba Water Fall.
Die WCs sind auch relativ modern und sauber.
location is the absolute best for walking distance to the views of the three sisters & scenic world. great little park. The older cabins could do with a deep clean other then that awesome spot.
Great location just showing it's age a bit.
Sites were good, location is also great but the amenities were not that good. 2 out of the 4 bqq 's were only functioning and were not cleaned by previous users.

The weekend we were there the facilities were in a poor state of affairs with blocked toilets and drains.
Caravan site was fine, but you park on concrete and have gravel under your awning. Depending on the site you get.
Was close to town and some awesome walks though especially the lit up night one.
Sloped sights pain in the butt but close to everything
Great location . Near to Echo Point & Scenic Railway. Camping site is large enough space for car & tent.

Absolutely a fantastic park that went above and beyond all expectations
On arrival, there appeared to be a mixup on our booking for a powered caravan site for two days.
Unfortunately the booking hadn’t gone through that we had made a number of days ago
The manager of the caravan park Said we could stay in a cabin for the same price as a powered caravan site for two nights which we greatly excepted
While the caravan park is situated right next to the Blue Mountains walks and numerous viewing platforms overlooking the vast National Park
Very close to 3 sisters and scenic world
Located across a beautiful walking track to the three sisters. The bus stop is opposite the camp site which makes it easy to go to the city centre.

Leider können wir den guten Rezessionen nicht mithalten. Wir haben 2 Nächte für 115$ am Tag zuvor reserviert, was wir eigentlich schon ganz schön viel finden und bekamen dafür den letzten Parkplatz direkt an der Strasse. Zudem waren wir das erste mal Campen und hatten Fragen, wie dert Stromkipper sein muss, das Personal könnte uns nicht helfen und war allgemein nicht sehr freundlich. Aber man kann nicht immer Glück haben :)
Had no tv for the 3 nights we stayed in the Lawson cabin  managers didn't even come and have a look we paid good money for this cabin  not very happy 😒

Absolutely lovely campsite with great spacious pitches, brilliant amenities, good wifi and placed perfectly to visit Katoomba (walking or by bus!) and the nearby Scenic World and Echo Point. My favourite campsite on our tour down from Brisbane to Sydney!

Great park with awesome staff.
We stayed on a powered site, nice level concrete pad which made set up easy (no guy ropes for awnings tho). Amenities were nice and clean with heaps of hot water.
Directly across the road from the trails and spectacular views. Would definitely recommend staying here.

Upon arrival, without a booking, Matt made sure we had a place to crash even though the park was full. For that we are very grateful. The amenities are clean and the park neat and tidy. The proximity to the tourist spots are so convenient and those tourist spots are amazing. If we are ever lucky enough to pass this way again we will be sure to book in advance as it’s well worth a return visit.

Very convenient location, reception was very friendly,
However the campsite is extremely small, it barely fit in our 3pp tent and a hatchback car. We were literally right to our neighbour 😅😅
Kitchen is very standard , equipped with fridge, kettle, toaster , a electrical stove and microwave.
Shower is comfortable with enough hot water.
Great location near Katoomba falls lookout points and scenic world, close to the city also! Clean and spacious amenities.
Excellent. Would have been 5 stars except for the cost.

Spectacular place! EXTREMELY convenient to the tourist spots and also the staff were extremely supportive and friendly, they went out of their way to make sure we have a good place that we could fit our super big motorhome!

We had to pay extra for a bigger space, but the fact that they were willing to adjust made a huge positive impact on us!
Right opposite Scenic World.

We stayed in a cabin (older style), was clean, comfy bed and great heater! Yes it was July and freezing cold conditions but beaut blue skies. Typical cold mountain air loved it considering we are from QLD . The park was quiet at this time of the year. We found the scenic skyway reasonably priced (book online) and beautiful views, was busy but queues were not a long wait 1 min or 2… The food in town is very pricey and everything seems to be of Asia cuisine?? But Woolworths, coles is there too. Enjoyed our stay and loved what the Blue mountains has to offer!!
Excellent enauited powered site to get through the low temperature in winter.We will be back

What a fantastic location for sightseeing around Katoomba & the Blue Mountains.
We feel it is way overpriced at $61/n for what's facilities are offered. This is $10-12 more than we are paying in Sydney & Brisbane, where we have a pool, mini golf, tennis courts & cafe on site.
